subject: Physics
title: Proving Entanglement Real
description: A short lesson to help you apply Proving Entanglement Real.

hook.text: In 1982, Alain Aspect ran the experiment that ended the debate. Quantum mechanics won.

buildup.text: Aspect tested Bell's inequality using entangled photons. He changed measurement settings mid-flight.

discovery.text: The results violated Bell's limit. No hidden variables. Entanglement is real and instantaneous.

twist.text: Loopholes remained. It took until 2015 for a fully loophole-free Bell test to close every gap.

climax.text: Aspect won the 2022 Nobel Prize alongside Clauser and Zeilinger for settling the question.

punchline.text: Einstein was wrong about this one. The universe is truly random.

quiz.question: What did Alain Aspect's experiment prove?
options: Entanglement is real and no hidden variables exist
Particles can communicate faster than light
Quantum mechanics only works at absolute zero
